title: Tab+
description: Replaces the vanilla tab list with a social-aware overlay: ping sparklines, session timers, sortable columns, relationship tag grouping, hover cards, player notes, and live filtering.
body:
## Tab+

A client-side mod that replaces the vanilla Tab list with a polished, social-aware overlay. Works on **any server** — no server-side plugin required.

---

### What's new in v1.1

**Ping sparklines** — Each player now shows an 8-sample bar chart of recent latency history, colour-coded green / yellow / red. Spot lag spikes at a glance instead of just seeing the current number.

**Session timers** — See how long each player has been online this session (e.g. `5m`, `1h12m`). Resets on disconnect.

**Sortable columns** — Press **R** to cycle through sort modes: Default → Name A–Z → Ping ↑ → Session. Current sort is shown in the status bar.

**Relationship tag grouping** — Press **G** to group the list by tag — Friends first, then Allies, Rivals, Enemies, then everyone else. A separator line marks each group boundary.

**Hover cards** — Mouse over any player to see a popup with their tag, note, and session duration without needing to open their profile.

---

### Full feature list

**Numerical ping** — Exact milliseconds instead of vague 1–5 bar icons.

**Relationship tags** — Mark players as Friend, Ally, Rival, or Enemy. Their name lights up in that tag's colour.

**Player notes** — Write a short note on any player. Stored per server and per UUID, persists across sessions.

**Live filter** — Type while Tab is held to filter by name or tag.

**Arrow key navigation** — ↑ / ↓ to move a highlight through the list.

---

### Controls

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| Tab (hold) | Open tab list |
| ↑ / ↓ | Move selection |
| Enter | Open player profile (edit tag & note) |
| T | Cycle tag for selected player |
| R | Cycle sort mode |
| G | Toggle group-by-tag |
| Type | Filter list by name or tag |
| Backspace | Delete last filter character |
| Escape | Clear filter |

---

### Storage

Notes and tags are saved per-server in `~/.minecraft/config/tabplus/<server-address>.json`, keyed by player UUID.

---

### Compatibility

Available for Fabric, Quilt, and NeoForge — Minecraft 1.21.1, 1.21.11, and 26.1.
